prompt: A cozy winter lifestyle advertisement poster. Tagline bottom: "Step into the cold, fearlessly." Small text top-right corner reads "Designed with GPT Image 2" in grey. Photorealistic, cozy winter fashion editorial, soft snowy blue white lighting.
